properties.name: drive.service-account-credentials
properties.description: Path to the Google Drive service account credentials JSON file.

properties.name: drive.base-folder-id
properties.description: Google Drive base folder ID (the 'cartas' root folder).

properties.name: drive.webhook-url
properties.description: Public HTTPS URL Google will POST change notifications to (POST /api/drive/webhook).

properties.name: ngrok.auth-token
properties.description: ngrok auth token for local dev tunneling. Leave blank in production.
